summary: T-Mobile subscriber live National TV Game in market - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN the user is a T-Mobile subscriber
AND there is a National TV Game scheduled/in-progress 
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals true in MASTepg

**NOTE:**
National TV game = FOX Saturday Baseball or ESPN Sunday Night Baseball

steps.action: WHEN the user views the National TV game tile focused or unfocused
steps.result:
THEN a blackout pill is displayed left aligned at the bottom of the game tile
AND a lock icon is displayed in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND the team colors in the matchup header have a dark overlay
